content: schwab-py provides client_from_access_functions(api_key, app_secret, token_read_func, token_write_func, asyncio=False) where token_read_func takes no args and returns the token object from custom storage (e.g. Postgres), and token_write_func receives the updated token on each refresh. Tokens are opaque JSON—serialize/deserialize with json module, never inspect internals. Access tokens expire in 30 min and are refreshed transparently; refresh tokens expire in 7 days (hard). StreamClient.login() authenticates the entire websocket session (not per-request). Supports LEVELONE_OPTIONS (delta/gamma/theta/vega/IV/mark), ACCT_ACTIVITY (fills/order events), chart subscriptions. Handler registration via add_SERVICE_NAME_handler() before subscribing; handle_message() is the event loop. Reconnect requires re-calling login().
